top_articles.title: Critical flaw in Protobuf library enables JavaScript code execution
top_articles.summary: Proof-of-concept exploit code has been published for a critical remote code execution flaw in protobuf.js, a widely used JavaScript implementation of Google's Protocol Buffers.

top_articles.title: CISA flags Apache ActiveMQ flaw as actively exploited in attacks
top_articles.summary: CISA warned that attackers are now exploiting a high-severity Apache ActiveMQ vulnerability, which was patched earlier this month after going undetected for 13 years.
